testcase.name: test_exactly_18

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 18 factions, got 20: ['dark-angels', 'emperors-children', 'iron-warriors', 'white-scars', 'space-wolves', 'imperial-fists', 'night-lords', 'blood-angels', 'iron-hands', 'world-eaters', 'ultramarines', 'death-guard', 'thousand-sons', 'sons-of-horus', 'word-bearers', 'salamanders', 'raven-guard', 'alpha-legion', 'solar-auxilia', 'imperialis-militia'] assert 20 == 18 + where 20 = len([{'available': True, 'color': '#1F4D2B', 'id': 'dark-angels', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Dark Angels may take 1 free Champion upgrade per 750 points and may upgrade any unit which has access to the Consul upgrade. In addition, units with a Champion, Lieutenant Commander, or Supreme Commander upgrade may add +1 to their Close Combat value (up to a maximum of 2+).', 'name': 'Paragons of Battle'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#7A2DA0', 'id': 'emperors-children', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Once per game, a player may elect to add 1 to their Strategy Rating when rolling for Initiative. For that turn, they may also re-roll any one additional failed Action test (you may not re-roll a re-roll). In addition, for that turn, any Character unit may add +1 to their Close Combat value (up to a maximum of 2+).', 'name': 'Exemplars of War'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#8C8079', 'id': 'iron-warriors', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'While taking a Shooting action, Iron Warriors impart a -1 modifier to enemy cover saves. Furthermore, Iron Warrior Infantry Character units gain the Siege trait.', 'name': 'Brick by Brick'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#E6E2D3', 'id': 'white-scars', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Legion Light Vehicles and Armoured Vehicles ignore the -1 penalty to shooting attacks when taking a Double action. In addition, all Aircraft, Light Vehicles, Armoured Vehicles, and units with the Mounted trait may re-roll all failed dangerous terrain checks.', 'name': 'Wind Born'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#324C5E', 'id': 'space-wolves', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Space Wolf Character units gain the Brutal trait. In addition, Infantry units in this Legion gain +5cm to their countercharge and consolidation moves.', 'name': 'Loping Advance'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#C9A227', 'id': 'imperial-fists', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Imperial Fist Tactical, Breacher, Phalanx Warder and Templar Brethren units may re-roll failed To Hit rolls of 1 when firing in the Firefight phase, and any formation containing at least one Phalanx Warder or Templar Brethren unit counts as having a Champion for the purposes of formation-level rules.', 'name': 'Disciplined Doctrine'}, ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_legions.py:56: in test_exactly_18 assert len(factions) == 18, f"expected 18 factions, got {len(factions)}: {[f['id'] for f in factions]}" E AssertionError: expected 18 factions, got 20: ['dark-angels', 'emperors-children', 'iron-warriors', 'white-scars', 'space-wolves', 'imperial-fists', 'night-lords', 'blood-angels', 'iron-hands', 'world-eaters', 'ultramarines', 'death-guard', 'thousand-sons', 'sons-of-horus', 'word-bearers', 'salamanders', 'raven-guard', 'alpha-legion', 'solar-auxilia', 'imperialis-militia'] E assert 20 == 18 E + where 20 = len([{'available': True, 'color': '#1F4D2B', 'id': 'dark-angels', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Dark Angels may take 1 free Champion upgrade per 750 points and may upgrade any unit which has access to the Consul upgrade. In addition, units with a Champion, Lieutenant Commander, or Supreme Commander upgrade may add +1 to their Close Combat value (up to a maximum of 2+).', 'name': 'Paragons of Battle'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#7A2DA0', 'id': 'emperors-children', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Once per game, a player may elect to add 1 to their Strategy Rating when rolling for Initiative. For that turn, they may also re-roll any one additional failed Action test (you may not re-roll a re-roll). In addition, for that turn, any Character unit may add +1 to their Close Combat value (up to a maximum of 2+).', 'name': 'Exemplars of War'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#8C8079', 'id': 'iron-warriors', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'While taking a Shooting action, Iron Warriors impart a -1 modifier to enemy cover saves. Furthermore, Iron Warrior Infantry Character units gain the Siege trait.', 'name': 'Brick by Brick'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#E6E2D3', 'id': 'white-scars', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Legion Light Vehicles and Armoured Vehicles ignore the -1 penalty to shooting attacks when taking a Double action. In addition, all Aircraft, Light Vehicles, Armoured Vehicles, and units with the Mounted trait may re-roll all failed dangerous terrain checks.', 'name': 'Wind Born'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#324C5E', 'id': 'space-wolves', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Space Wolf Character units gain the Brutal trait. In addition, Infantry units in this Legion gain +5cm to their countercharge and consolidation moves.', 'name': 'Loping Advance'}, ...}, {'available': True, 'color': '#C9A227', 'id': 'imperial-fists', 'legionTrait': {'description': 'Imperial Fist Tactical, Breacher, Phalanx Warder and Templar Brethren units may re-roll failed To Hit rolls of 1 when firing in the Firefight phase, and any formation containing at least one Phalanx Warder or Templar Brethren unit counts as having a Champion for the purposes of formation-level rules.', 'name': 'Disciplined Doctrine'}, ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_identity_overrides_in_list

failure.message:
AssertionError: dark-angels trait mismatch (Paragons of Battle) assert 'Paragons of Battle' == 'Grim Resolve'
- Grim Resolve + Paragons of Battle

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_legions.py:75: in test_identity_overrides_in_list assert f["legionTrait"]["name"] == exp["trait"], f"{fid} trait mismatch ({f['legionTrait']['name']})" E AssertionError: dark-angels trait mismatch (Paragons of Battle) E assert 'Paragons of Battle' == 'Grim Resolve' E E - Grim Resolve E + Paragons of Battle

testcase.name: test_detail_identity_override[dark-angels]

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'Paragons of Battle' == 'Grim Resolve'
- Grim Resolve + Paragons of Battle

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_legions.py:102: in test_detail_identity_override assert d["legionTrait"]["name"] == exp["trait"] E AssertionError: assert 'Paragons of Battle' == 'Grim Resolve' E E - Grim Resolve E + Paragons of Battle

testcase.name: test_detail_identity_override[emperors-children]

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'Exemplars of War' == 'Flawless Execution'
- Flawless Execution + Exemplars of War

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_legions.py:102: in test_detail_identity_override assert d["legionTrait"]["name"] == exp["trait"] E AssertionError: assert 'Exemplars of War' == 'Flawless Execution' E E - Flawless Execution E + Exemplars of War

failure.message:

- #D0A93B + #C9A227

assert 'Twin Serpents' == "Hydra's Many Heads"
- Hydra's Many Heads + Twin Serpents

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_legions.py:102: in test_detail_identity_override assert d["legionTrait"]["name"] == exp["trait"] E assert 'Twin Serpents' == "Hydra's Many Heads" E E - Hydra's Many Heads E + Twin Serpents

testcase.name: test_baseline_roster_size_consistent

failure.message: AssertionError: dark-angels has 45 formations vs ref 46 assert 45 == 46 + where 45 = len([{'allowedUpgrades': ['standard-transport', 'drop-assault', 'assault-claw', 'heavy-transport', 'consul', 'armoury-asset', ...], 'baseCost': 275, 'category': 'Line', 'composition': '8 Tactical OR 8 Despoiler units', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['drop-assault', 'consul'], 'baseCost': 300, 'category': 'Line', 'composition': '8 Assault units (+25 each additional, up to 10)', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['drop-assault', 'assault-claw', 'heavy-transport', 'consul', 'armoury-asset', 'dreadnought', ...], 'baseCost': 300, 'category': 'Line', 'composition': '8 Breacher units (+25 each additional, up to 10)', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['assault-claw', 'heavy-transport', 'teleport', 'consul', 'armoury-asset', 'dreadnought', ...], 'baseCost': 300, 'category': 'Line', 'composition': '4 Terminator units (+75 each additional, up to 6)', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['drop-assault', 'consul'], 'baseCost': 175, 'category': 'Support', 'composition': '4 Assault units', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['drop-assault', 'assault-claw', 'heavy-transport', 'consul', 'armoury-asset', 'dreadnought'], 'baseCost': 175, 'category': 'Support', 'composition': '4 Breacher units', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_legions.py:117: in test_baseline_roster_size_consistent assert len(d["formations"]) == n_form, f"{fid} has {len(d['formations'])} formations vs ref {n_form}" E AssertionError: dark-angels has 45 formations vs ref 46 E assert 45 == 46 E + where 45 = len([{'allowedUpgrades': ['standard-transport', 'drop-assault', 'assault-claw', 'heavy-transport', 'consul', 'armoury-asset', ...], 'baseCost': 275, 'category': 'Line', 'composition': '8 Tactical OR 8 Despoiler units', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['drop-assault', 'consul'], 'baseCost': 300, 'category': 'Line', 'composition': '8 Assault units (+25 each additional, up to 10)', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['drop-assault', 'assault-claw', 'heavy-transport', 'consul', 'armoury-asset', 'dreadnought', ...], 'baseCost': 300, 'category': 'Line', 'composition': '8 Breacher units (+25 each additional, up to 10)', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['assault-claw', 'heavy-transport', 'teleport', 'consul', 'armoury-asset', 'dreadnought', ...], 'baseCost': 300, 'category': 'Line', 'composition': '4 Terminator units (+75 each additional, up to 6)', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['drop-assault', 'consul'], 'baseCost': 175, 'category': 'Support', 'composition': '4 Assault units', ...}, {'allowedUpgrades': ['drop-assault', 'assault-claw', 'heavy-transport', 'consul', 'armoury-asset', 'dreadnought'], 'baseCost': 175, 'category': 'Support', 'composition': '4 Breacher units', ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_dreadwing_rule_appended

failure.message: AssertionError: missing Dreadwing in compositionRules: ['Max 3 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army.', 'Max 4 Upgrades per formation.', 'Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies.', 'Interremptors and Deathwing Companions: 1 per 2,000 pts each.', "Primarch Lion El'Jonson may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander."] assert 'Dreadwing' in "Max 3 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army. | Max 4 Upgrades per formation. | Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies. | Interremptors and Deathwing Companions: 1 per 2,000 pts each. | Primarch Lion El'Jonson may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander."

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_legions.py:136: in test_dreadwing_rule_appended assert keyword in joined, f"missing {keyword} in compositionRules: {rules}" E AssertionError: missing Dreadwing in compositionRules: ['Max 3 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army.', 'Max 4 Upgrades per formation.', 'Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies.', 'Interremptors and Deathwing Companions: 1 per 2,000 pts each.', "Primarch Lion El'Jonson may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander."] E assert 'Dreadwing' in "Max 3 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army. | Max 4 Upgrades per formation. | Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies. | Interremptors and Deathwing Companions: 1 per 2,000 pts each. | Primarch Lion El'Jonson may only be taken once and counts as your Supreme Commander."

testcase.name: test_promethean_fire

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'Promethean Cult' == 'Promethean Fire'
- Promethean Fire + Promethean Cult

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_legions.py:148: in test_promethean_fire assert d["legionTrait"]["name"] == "Promethean Fire" E AssertionError: assert 'Promethean Cult' == 'Promethean Fire' E E - Promethean Fire E + Promethean Cult

testcase.name: test_list_is_exactly_18_and_no_baseline

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 18, got 20: ['dark-angels', 'emperors-children', 'iron-warriors', 'white-scars', 'space-wolves', 'imperial-fists', 'night-lords', 'blood-angels', 'iron-hands', 'world-eaters', 'ultramarines', 'death-guard', 'thousand-sons', 'sons-of-horus', 'word-bearers', 'salamanders', 'raven-guard', 'alpha-legion', 'solar-auxilia', 'imperialis-militia'] assert 20 == 18 + where 20 = len(['dark-angels', 'emperors-children', 'iron-warriors', 'white-scars', 'space-wolves', 'imperial-fists', ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_soh_isolation.py:37: in test_list_is_exactly_18_and_no_baseline assert len(ids) == 18, f"expected 18, got {len(ids)}: {ids}" E AssertionError: expected 18, got 20: ['dark-angels', 'emperors-children', 'iron-warriors', 'white-scars', 'space-wolves', 'imperial-fists', 'night-lords', 'blood-angels', 'iron-hands', 'world-eaters', 'ultramarines', 'death-guard', 'thousand-sons', 'sons-of-horus', 'word-bearers', 'salamanders', 'raven-guard', 'alpha-legion', 'solar-auxilia', 'imperialis-militia'] E assert 20 == 18 E + where 20 = len(['dark-angels', 'emperors-children', 'iron-warriors', 'white-scars', 'space-wolves', 'imperial-fists', ...])

testcase.name: test_no_soh_units[night-lords]

failure.message: AssertionError: night-lords leaked SoH units: {'despoiler'} assert not {'despoiler'}

testcase.name: test_no_soh_units[word-bearers]

failure.message: AssertionError: word-bearers leaked SoH units: {'despoiler'} assert not {'despoiler'}

testcase.name: test_no_soh_units[alpha-legion]

failure.message: AssertionError: alpha-legion leaked SoH units: {'despoiler'} assert not {'despoiler'}

testcase.name: test_has_own_legion_trait[ultramarines]

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/factions/ultramarines (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xfe8e27c429d0>, 'Connection to armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=15)'))

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:204: in _new_conn sock = connection.create_connection( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:85: in create_connection raise err /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/connection.py:73: in create_connection sock.connect(sa) E TimeoutError: timed out
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:788: in urlopen response = self._make_request( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:488: in _make_request raise new_e /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:464: in _make_request self._validate_conn(conn) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1106: in _validate_conn conn.connect() /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:759: in connect self.sock = sock = self._new_conn() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connection.py:213: in _new_conn raise ConnectTimeoutError( E urllib3.exceptions.ConnectTimeoutError: (<HTTPSConnection(host='armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xfe8e27c429d0>, 'Connection to armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=15)')
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:696: in send resp = conn.urlopen( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:842: in urlopen retries = retries.increment( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/urllib3/util/retry.py:543: in increment raise MaxRetryError(_pool, url, reason) from reason # type: ignore[arg-type] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E urllib3.exceptions.MaxRetryError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/factions/ultramarines (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xfe8e27c429d0>, 'Connection to armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=15)'))
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_soh_isolation.py:123: in test_has_own_legion_trait d = requests.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/factions/{fid}", timeout=15).json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:87: in get return request("get", url, params=params, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/api.py:71: in request return session.request(method=method, url=url, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:651: in request resp = self.send(prep, **send_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:784: in send r = adapter.send(request, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py:717: in send raise ConnectTimeout(e, request=request) E requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/factions/ultramarines (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xfe8e27c429d0>, 'Connection to armageddon-squad.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=15)'))
